name: [TBZ] - Vance Leon, F.N.G
description:
THE BLACK ZONE

Zombie apocalypse world made by yours truly, inspired by L4D, TLOU, WWZ and others

The Beginning

America was just recovering from what almost became World War 3. A dictator, which was ruling Russia at the time, made the bold decision to invade the United States through a covert organization in Cuba. The invasion was followed after an EMP attack disabled NORAD temporarily. The Russo-American war lasted all but two months, when Russia’s dictator was killed during the Russian Civil War and peace agreements had been made (followed by the mass reduction of the Russian Military by order of NATO.)

So all was said and done, for now at least. Effects of the war were minimal, with only the east coast even having active engagements. Despite this, America would remain in temporary martial law to wipe out any RGF still hiding out within.

An Unlikely Foe

Working closely with DARPA, and officially contracted by the U.S Government, was a Pharmaceutical Corporation known as ParaSec. ParaSec, or Paranormal Security as its actual name, was more than just a Medical Corp. It was a full Private Military Organization and also the dominant medical corporation in the entire world. On the outside (to the public,) ParaSec was your normal pharmacy for meds or your scientists looking to cure cancer. Even to DARPA it was only that, apart from its military side. In actuality, ParaSec was created biological weapons of mass destruction behind closed curtains and huge labs deep underground. This included an off-the-books experiment on Influenza-A research... which went horribly wrong.

The Outbreak

Nobody knows right now how exactly it happened, but at some point ParaSec’s experiments escaped. This Influenza-A research, was used on actual human test subjects. The result of it? This new man-made flu strain sent people into a crazy aggro state, causing bleeding of the orifices (ears, mouth, nose, ect,) and an uncontrollable aggression to non-infected individuals. At some point, an infected bit a researcher causing a chain reaction that released the virus into the outside world. The airborne strain was short lived, and initially was written off as a deadly flu strain by the CDC. Days later, those people became like the first infected. The CDC and FEMA eventually called this the "Black Flu." When the government found out that this was by ParaSec, it was already too late. The entire east coast was infected, and as a result a massive border was constructed which completely sealed off all east coast states. This became known as the "Black Zone." The Black Zone is not desolate of non-infected, in fact many survivor communities are inside. The quarantine walls were constructed to prevent the spread, but the military had plans to get the survivors out.

The Black Flu

The Black Flu does not kill people and reanimate them, rather it takes control of emotional function and sends infected into a primal, aggressive state. They bite, maul, among other things. Due to the lethality, the Black Flu does in fact kill the infected eventually. Since they are simply aggressive humans, they can starve and die of a fever like any virus. So far, it’s determined that the average infected succumb after a week of infection, though they can live longer under certain circumstances (such as eating corpses to stay full, or infected with higher immune systems being able to resist the infection.)
creator: rosalinertq67
